result:
**Compressed Working Context - Operational Log (2026-07-19)**

**Scope:** Infrastructure operations covering 15 services (billing-worker, report-builder, session-manager, webhook-relay, search-indexer, cache-warmer, audit-logger, metrics-collector, ingest-api, user-profile-service, scheduler-core, payment-gateway, notification-daemon, export-pipeline, auth-service) across 6 environments (dev, QA, production, staging, blue/green/canary).

**Operations Performed:** 60+ instances throughout sprint day: scale changes, upgrades, migrations, patches, restarts, reconfigurations, rollbacks, health-checks, drains, redeploys, pauses, downgrades.

**Outcome Distribution:**
- Completed without errors: ~40%
- Finished ahead of schedule: ~20%
- Required manual retry: ~10% (ingest-api blue/staging, audit-logger staging, webhook-relay green, cache-warmer prod, export-pipeline dev, ingest-api blue redeploy)
- Took longer than expected: ~15% (payment-gateway dev/prod, report-builder blue, search-indexer dev, webhook-relay blue)
- Emitted warnings: ~15% (audit-logger prod, notification-daemon dev)

**Key Outcomes:**
- Memory pressure reduced: auth-service, session-manager, metrics-collector
- Error rates stabilized: export-pipeline green/canary, notification-daemon prod, search-indexer blue, webhook-relay green, scheduler-core prod
- Alerts cleared: ingest-api dev, report-builder QA
- Queue depths drained to zero following retries; CPU returned to baseline within 1 hour
- All health-checks passed or recovered via retry
- No customer impact observed

**Follow-up Actions Filed:**
- Configuration tidying (report-builder blue)
- Threshold reviews for next week (notification-daemon, payment-gateway, cache-warmer)
- Documentation updates (audit-logger drain procedure, notification-daemon redeployment)
- Postmortem notes in runbooks (auth-service, ingest-api, session-manager, audit-logger, export-pipeline)
- Logs archived for review

**Operational Health:** No active incidents or escalations. Pager remained quiet throughout most shifts.

**Status:** All operations executed as routine maintenance with standard follow-up. Work ready to continue.
